case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SF HYMAN SERVICES AGENCY et al VS WALTMON, CHRISTINA

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 779146 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF HYMAN SERVICES AGENCY DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ATTN: J.W. JEFFERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WALTMON, CHRISTINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF HYMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALTMON, CHRISTINA $1,647.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,647.00, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE #779146 RENDERED ON JUNE 09, 1999. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $833.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $914.42 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WALTMON, CHRISTINA
COPIES OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT APPLICATION, NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT, MEMOC AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT.
